billing_paywall.softWarningTitle: You're getting a lot out of AskBiz
billing_paywall.softWarningBody: You've used {questionsUsed} of your {questionLimit} monthly questions. You're clearly finding value — unlock more so you never have to stop mid-analysis.
billing_paywall.limitReachedTitle: You've made the most of your free plan
billing_paywall.limitReachedBody: You've used all {questionLimit} free questions this month. Upgrade to keep going — your data and conversations are all saved and waiting.
billing_paywall.featureLockedBody: {feature} is available on the Growth plan. Upgrade to unlock expansion intelligence, live sync, alerts, forecasts, and more.
billing_paywall.footer: 7-day free trial · Cancel anytime · Price locked for early adopters
